hinglish_natural: Kya aapne high school ke students leke dosti ki aur pasand ki jaati hain wohon ka naam suna hai?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kyaa aapki jaan mein high school ke studenton jaise hi unhen dosti milegi aur unhen pasand ki jaegi wohon ka naam kya hain?
sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id INTERSECT SELECT T2.name FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.liked_id  =  T2.id

english: What are the file sizes and formats for all songs with a resolution lower than 800?

hinglish_natural: on-hold status mein building ka list banana aur unhe building stories ki increasing tarah se arrange karna
hinglish_hindi_heavy: find the names of the buildings in on-hold status, aur sort karo building stories ki increasing order mein
sql: SELECT name FROM buildings WHERE Status  =  "on-hold" ORDER BY Stories ASC

english: Find the department name that is in Building "Mergenthaler".
hinglish_light: Find the department name jo Building Mergenthaler mein hai
hinglish_natural: Building Mergenthaler mein kaunsa department name pade
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Building Mergenthaler mein kaunsa department name pade, find the department name which is in
sql: SELECT DName FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE Building  =  "Mergenthaler

english: What is the savings balance of the account belonging to the customer with the highest checking balance?
hinglish_light: What is the paise baalanc of the account belonging to the customer with the highest chekking baalanc?
hinglish_natural: Aapki question hai ki account ka paise baalanc kya hai jo chekking baalanc se jyada hoga aur wo customer ka jo mention hai?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kya chekking baalanc se jyada hua customer ka account ka paise baalanc kya hai?
sql: SELECT T3.balance FROM accounts AS T1 JOIN checking AS T2 ON T1.custid  =  T2.custid JOIN savings AS T3 ON T1.custid  =  T3.custid ORDER BY T2.balance DESC LIMIT 1

english: Which university is in Los Angeles county and opened after 1950?
hinglish_light: Which university hai in Los Angeles county aur 1950 ke baad open ki thi?
hinglish_natural: Los Angeles county mein kis university jo 1950 se baad open ki thi?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Los Angeles county mein kis university ko jiska opening 1950 ke baad hua tha?
sql: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE county  =  "Los Angeles" AND YEAR  >  1950

english: Show the album names, ids and the number of tracks for each album.
hinglish_light: Show the album names, ids aur the number of tracks for each album.
hinglish_natural: Show album names, ids aur track numbers for each album.
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Show the album names, ids aur the number of tracks for each album.
sql: SELECT T1.Title ,  T2.AlbumID ,  COUNT(*) FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId GROUP BY T2.AlbumID

english: What are the title and director of the films without any schedule?
hinglish_light: What are the title aur director name of the films jo schedule nahi hai?
hinglish_natural: Films jo schedule nahi hai, unki title aur director kya hain?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Jo films schedule nahi hai unki title aur director kyun nahi deti?
sql: SELECT title ,  directed_by FROM film WHERE film_id NOT IN (SELECT film_id FROM schedule)

english: List the top 5 genres by number of tracks. List genres name and total tracks.
hinglish_light: List the top 5 genres by number of tracks
hinglish_natural: Top 5 gēnras se list karo jo sāare trakks ka saāt de
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Top 5 gēnras by trakks ka sāat list karo; gēnra namen aur trakk sāat.
sql: SELECT T1.name ,  COUNT(*) FROM genres AS T1 JOIN tracks AS T2 ON T2.genre_id  =  T1.id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5;

english: What are the distinct nominees of the musicals with the award that is not "Tony Award"?
hinglish_light: What are the distinct nominees of the musicals with the award that is not Tony Award?
hinglish_natural: Musical ke nomination kya hain jo Tony Award nahi hai?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Musical mei kis ke nomination hain jo Tony Award nahi hain?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Nominee FROM musical WHERE Award != "Tony Award

english: What are the dates of birth of entrepreneurs with investor "Simon Woodroffe" or "Peter Jones"?
hinglish_light: What are the doobara tareekh of entrepreneurs with investor Simon Woodroffe or Peter Jones?
hinglish_natural: Kya doobara tareekh of entrepreneurs with investor Simon Woodroffe ya Peter Jones hain?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kya doobara tareekh of entrepreneurs with investor Simon Woodroffe yaar Peter Jones hain?
sql: SELECT T2.Date_of_Birth FROM entrepreneur AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Investor  =  "Simon Woodroffe" OR T1.Investor  =  "Peter Jones

english: What are the team and the location of school each player belongs to?
hinglish_light: What are the team aur location of school each player belongs to?
hinglish_natural: Team aur school ki location kitni players ne kahan se aaye hain?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kyun kya team aur school ka location hi kyunki players se pata chala?
sql: SELECT T1.Team ,  T2.Location FROM player AS T1 JOIN school AS T2 ON T1.School_ID  =  T2.School_ID

english: Find the name and partition id for users who tweeted less than twice.
hinglish_light: Find the name aur partition id yaar jo tweet kari gaye kehne mein jyada se jyaada do baar nahi kar liye.
hinglish_natural: Find the name aur partition id users jo tweet kare kehne mein do baar nahi kar chuke hain.
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Find the name aur partition id ke liye users jo tweet kare kehne mein to do baar nahi kar liye.
sql: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.partitionid FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN tweets AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.uid GROUP BY T2.uid HAVING count(*)  <  2

english: What are the names and year of joining for artists that do not have the country "United States"?
hinglish_light: What are the names aur joining year of artists jo United States nahi kahe rahi hain?
hinglish_natural: Kya artists jinhen United States nahi hai unka name aur joining kaal kya hai?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kyi kya artists ki naam aur joining kaal jo United States nahi kahe rahi hain?
sql: SELECT name ,  year_join FROM artist WHERE country != 'United States

english: What are the amenities in alphabetical order that Anonymous Donor Hall has?
hinglish_light: What are the amenities in alphabetical order that Anonymous Donor Hall has?
hinglish_natural: Anonymous Donor Hall mein kya pahle se phirse shubh evam visheshit uttamanikay hain jo abhi alphabet ke tarah chahiye?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: kya Anonymous Donor Hall mein amenities alphabet se jaise chahiye hain unmein kya pahle se phirse hain?
sql: SELECT T1.amenity_name FROM dorm_amenity AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T2.amenid  =  T1.amenid JOIN dorm AS T3 ON T2.dormid  =  T3.dormid WHERE T3.dorm_name  =  'Anonymous Donor Hall' ORDER BY T1.amenity_name

english: What is the campus fee for San Jose State University in 1996?
hinglish_light: What is the campus fee for San Jose State University in 1996?
hinglish_natural: 1996 में सान जोस स्टेट यूनिवर्सिटी का कैंपस फीस क्या है?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: kyunki 1996 mein San Jose State University ka campus fee kya tha?
sql: SELECT campusfee FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN csu_fees AS T2 ON T1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t1.campus  =  "San Jose State University" AND T2.year  =  1996

english: What are the papers published under the institution "Indiana University"?
hinglish_light: What are the papers published under the institution Indiana University?
hinglish_natural: इंडियाना यूनिवर्सिटी के नाम से प्रकाशित किन पेपर हैं?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: kya the papers published under the institution Indiana University ke naam se hain?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.title FROM papers AS t1 JOIN authorship AS t2 ON t1.paperid  =  t2.paperid JOIN inst AS t3 ON t2.instid  =  t3.instid WHERE t3.name  =  "Indiana University

english: What are the employee ids of employees who report to Payam, and what are their salaries?
hinglish_light: What are the employee ids of employees who report to Payam, aur unke salaries kya hain?
hinglish_natural: Employee ids kya hain jo Payam se report karte hain, aur unke salaries kya hain?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kyun employee ids vishesh se kya hain jinke report Payam lete hain, aur unki salaries kya hain?
sql: SELECT employee_id ,  salary FROM employees WHERE manager_id  =  (SELECT employee_id FROM employees WHERE first_name  =  'Payam' )

english: find the name of driver who is driving the school bus with the longest working history.
hinglish_light: find the name of driver jo is driving the school bus jisme longest working history hain.
hinglish_natural: find the name of driver jo is driving the school bus jisme longest working history hain.
hinglish_hindi_heavy: find the name of driver jo is driving the school bus jisme longest working history hain.
sql: SELECT t1.name FROM driver AS t1 JOIN school_bus AS t2 ON t1.driver_id  =  t2.driver_id ORDER BY years_working DESC LIMIT 1

english: Find the state of the college which player Charles is attending.
hinglish_light: Find the state of the college jo player Charles r attendi hai.
hinglish_natural: Find the state of the college jo player Charles r attendi hai.
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Find the state of the college jo player Charles r attendi hai.
sql: SELECT T1.state FROM college AS T1 JOIN tryout AS T2 ON T1.cName  =  T2.cName JOIN player AS T3 ON T2.pID  =  T3.pID WHERE T3.pName  =  'Charles

english: Find the id and number of shops for the company that produces the most expensive furniture.
hinglish_light: Find the id aur number of shops jo kaam jada daamdaa meblej ka produce karte hain.
hinglish_natural: Find the id aur number of shops jo kaam jada daamdaa meblej ka produce karte hain.
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Find the id aur number of shops jo kaam jada daamdaa meblej ka produce karte hain.
sql: SELECT t1.manufacturer_id ,  t1.num_of_shops FROM manufacturer AS t1 JOIN furniture_manufacte AS t2 ON t1.manufacturer_id  =  t2.manufacturer_id ORDER BY t2.Price_in_Dollar DESC LIMIT 1

english: What is the last name of the professor whose office is located in DRE 102, and when were they hired?
hinglish_light: What is the last name of the professor jo office DRE 102 mili hai, aur unhe kahan se hi gaya?
hinglish_natural: Last name kya hai wo professor ko jo DRE 102 mein office hai, aur unhen kahan se hi gaya tha?
hinglish_hindi_heavy: Kya aap last name dekhte hain wo professor ki jo DRE 102 mili hai, aur unhen kahan se hi gaya tha?
sql: SELECT T1.emp_lname ,  T1.emp_hiredate FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num WHERE T2.prof_office  =  'DRE 102
